🚀 Hiring Alert: AI Tech Lead - Full Stack Engineer (Senior)
SHIFT- 2 pm to 11 p.m OR 3 to 12 p.m
5+ Years
Remote (India)
Budget: Client Specified (INR)
Contract

● 5+ years full stack experience
● Strong React/Next.js and Node.js
● Experience with MongoDB
● Deep comfort with AI-first development
● Experience with Sanity.io or similar schema-based CMS
● Experience with Locofy.ai, Anima App, or similar tools

👉 I’m a Talent Supply Consultant connecting Clients with Curated Vendor & Market Talent.

👉 If you have a matching profile, pls comment “Interested” for more details. If not connected, send me a connection invitation so that I can DM the details. Pls DO NOT call/mail me.

Note: Roles are likely to remain "open" up to 1 or 2 working days. Commenting will be disabled once the role is closed. Generally part-timing, freelancing or moonlighting are not allowed, unless specified otherwise.

#AITechLead #FullStackEngineer #AIJobs #NextJS #ReactJS #NodeJS #MongoDB #RemoteHiring #TechHiring #GenerativeAI #AutomationTools #ITJobsIndia

🚀 Hiring: Senior Automation Test Engineer (AI-Driven Quality Engineering) | 7–8 Years Experience
📍 Location: Pune (Hybrid – 3 Days Onsite)
 💼 Model: Contract-to-Hire
We are looking for experienced Automation Engineers with a strong background in Selenium, Java/Python, and modern AI-driven testing approaches. If you’re passionate about combining test automation with emerging AI technologies, this is an exciting opportunity!
🔍 Key Responsibilities:
 • Design & develop scalable automation frameworks using Java or Python
 • Perform UI & functional testing using Selenium / Playwright
 • Execute API & backend testing
 • Integrate automation suites into CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions, Azure
DevOps)
 • Explore and implement AI-driven testing solutions
💡 Must-Have Skills:
 ✔ Strong programming in Java (TestNG/JUnit) or Python (PyTest/Behave)
 ✔ Hands-on experience with Selenium WebDriver / Playwright
 ✔ Experience in API testing & backend validation
 ✔ Good knowledge of Maven & Git-based version control
 ✔ Experience in framework development
🤖 AI / Emerging Tech Exposure:
• Basic understanding of Machine Learning & NLP concepts
 • Familiarity with Generative AI, LLMs & Prompt Engineering
 • Awareness of AI-driven testing practices
⭐ Preferred:
 • Experience with AI-powered testing tools
 • Exposure to Google Vertex AI or similar platforms
 • Telecom domain experience is a plus
🎯 Experience Required: 7–8 Years
🔥 We’re looking for professionals who can go beyond execution and build intelligent, future-ready automation solutions.
📩 Interested candidates can DM me or share their profiles.

🚀 Hiring: Senior Automation Engineers (AI-Driven Quality Engineering) | 7–8 Years Experience
📍 Location: Pune (Hybrid – 3 Days Onsite)
 💼 Model: Contract-to-Hire
We are actively looking for Senior Automation Engineers who can design, build, and scale automation frameworks while leveraging modern tools and AI-driven testing approaches. If you have a strong coding mindset and hands-on experience in end-to-end automation, this role is for you!
🔍 Key Responsibilities:
 • Design & develop scalable automation frameworks for UI, API & integration testing
 • Build automation using Selenium, Java, TestNG/JUnit
 • Develop and execute API automation (REST)
 • Integrate test suites into CI/CD pipelines (Jenkins, GitHub Actions)
 • Work on framework enhancements (POM, BDD, Data-Driven, Hybrid)
 • Perform database validation using SQL
• Collaborate with dev teams to improve test coverage and quality
 • Contribute to cloud-based automation (AWS, Docker)
 • Ensure best practices for scalability, maintainability & reusability
💡 Must-Have Skills:
 ✔ Strong hands-on experience with Selenium WebDriver
 ✔ Proficiency in Java, TestNG/JUnit, Maven
 ✔ Experience with Git, Jenkins, REST API testing (RestAssured/Karate)
 ✔ Strong knowledge of automation framework development
 ✔ Experience in microservices testing & CI/CD integration
 ✔ Working knowledge of SQL & Linux environments
🤖 Nice to Have:
 • Experience with Groovy, Spring, Concordion
 • Exposure to AWS, Docker, GitHub Actions
 • Performance testing exposure
 • Telecom domain experience
🎯 Experience Required: 7–8 Years
🔥 We’re looking for professionals who don’t just execute tests but own automation strategy, framework design, and innovation in testing (including AI-driven approaches).
📩 Interested candidates can DM me or share their profiles.

We’re #Hiring! 🚀

Java Developer (Contract)

📍 Location: Bangalore
 💼 Work Mode: Work from Office 
 ⏳ Experience: 5+ Years
 ⏱ Duration: 6 Months

Core Tech Stack:

• Java, React (Node.js / Webpack / Vite)
• Spring Boot, Spring Framework, Hibernate
• MongoDB, Apache Spark
• Tools: Postman, Jira
• IDEs: VS Code, IntelliJ

Infrastructure & Security:

• Hands-on experience with AWS & GCP (IAM, Docker, Kubernetes)
• Understanding of vulnerability management (SAST/DAST, CVE remediation)

Good to Have:

• Security tools: Wiz, CrowdStrike, Qualys, Prisma, Black Duck
• Knowledge of secure coding, PKI, Bouncy Castle FIPS
• Experience with IAM, Secrets Management, EKS/GKE
• Exposure to AI dev tools like Claude or Cursor

📩 Apply now: hr@diligentgrowth.com

#Hiring #JavaDeveloper #ContractJobs #BangaloreJobs #TechJobs #BackendDeveloper #FullStackDeveloper #CloudJobs #CyberSecurity #AWS #GCP #Kubernetes #HiringNow #IndiaJobs

As India's four Labour Codes reshape wages, benefits and flexible hiring, Archana Balasubramanian explains what every employer must do now - and why waiting is not an option and compliance reckoning facing every Indian employer.

The Labour Codes introduce, for the first time, a uniform statutory definition of "wages" that applies across multiple central labour enactments, replacing the disparate definitions previously found in numerous statutes such as the Payment of Wages Act, 1936, the Minimum Wages Act, 1948 and the Payment of Bonus Act, 1965.

Read More: https://lnkd.in/ghKNr4rV

Hi all ,



🚀 We’re Hiring: Senior Software Engineer (Azure, .NET, AI)

📍 Location: Remote

💼 Experience: 6+ Years

🕒 Shift: 3:00 PM – 12:00 AM IST

contract for 6 months to 0ne years 

  

🔗 LinkedIn Profile is Mandatory

We are looking for a highly skilled Senior Software Engineer to join our team and contribute to building cutting-edge Azure-hosted web applications and services. If you have strong expertise in .NET, Azure, and AI technologies, this is a great opportunity to grow and make an impact!



🔹 Key Responsibilities:

Develop and maintain Azure-based web applications and services

Work across the full software development lifecycle

Build and manage CI/CD pipelines using Azure DevOps

Collaborate with cross-functional teams and mentor junior engineers

Continuously improve engineering practices and system performance

🔹 Core Skills (Must-Have):

6–8 years of experience in .NET/C# development

Strong hands-on experience with Azure services (Storage, App Configuration, etc.)

Expertise in RESTful APIs and web services

Proficiency in Git-based version control

Experience with CI/CD pipelines (Azure DevOps)

Solid understanding of Microservices Architecture

Strong knowledge of SQL/Databases

Experience in unit testing, debugging & performance optimization

Familiarity with Agile methodologies

Experience with AI technologies

Knowledge of Semantic Kernel

Exposure to Microsoft AI Foundry

Experience with Blazor / HTML

Hands-on with Azure Speech Services

Familiarity with Microsoft Aspire

💡 If you are passionate about building scalable cloud solutions and working with modern AI-driven technologies, we’d love to connect!

📩 Apply now by sharing your updated resume along with your LinkedIn profile.

#Hiring #AzureJobs #DotNet #AI #SoftwareEngineer #HyderabadJobs #TechCareers #ImmediateHiring



Email ID : rajeswariboya997@gmail.com



Contact number : 9381832432

We’re Hiring: Business Development Manager / Sales Executive (Remote | Commission-Based)

Simplrize is looking for experienced Business Development / Sales professionals (7+ years) to drive global client acquisition for IT services (AI, Cybersecurity, Web & App Development, Software, Digital Solutions).

🌍 Remote | APAC Preferred
💼 Freelance / Contract
💰 100% Commission-Based (High Earning Potential)

🎯 Ideal for:
	•	Freelance sales professionals
	•	BD consultants & closers
	•	Agencies open to partnerships

If you have a strong network and proven deal-closing experience, let’s collaborate.

📩 Send your profile: info@simplrize.com

🧠 We’re Hiring: LLM / Knowledge Engineer

We are hiring LLM / Knowledge Engineers who can design high-performance RAG pipelines and LLM-based knowledge systems for enterprise AI solutions.

📍 Location: Pune / Bangalore / Gurgaon
💼 Experience: 3+ Years
📄 Duration: 6 Months Contract (Extendable)
⏰ Shift: General Shift – IST (Mon–Fri)

🔹 Key Skills:
• Prompt Engineering & LLM optimization
• LiteLLM / AWS Bedrock / Azure OpenAI
• RAG pipelines using LlamaIndex or LangChain
• Vector databases – OpenSearch, Qdrant, Weaviate, Milvus
• Embedding models – Titan, Cohere, OpenAI
• Hybrid retrieval (Dense + BM25)
• Evaluation frameworks – Ragas / DeepEval / Langfuse
• Knowledge Graphs – Neptune / Neo4j

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
• Design and maintain LLM abstraction layers
• Implement model routing strategies
• Build and optimize RAG pipelines
• Manage vector databases and retrieval strategies
• Run prompt and retrieval evaluation experiments

📩 Interested candidates can share resumes at: hannah@timusconsulting.com

#AIJobs #LLM #RAG #PromptEngineering #VectorDatabase #Python #HiringNow #TechJobs

🚀 We’re Hiring: Agentic AI Engineer (AWS)

We are looking for Agentic AI Engineers who can design and build intelligent AI agent workflows for enterprise applications.

📍 Location: Pune / Bangalore / Gurgaon
💼 Experience: 3+ Years
📄 Duration: 6 Months Contract (Extendable)
⏰ Shift: General Shift – IST (Mon–Fri)

🔹 Key Skills:
• LangGraph / LangChain
• Python (FastAPI, asyncio, pytest)
• AWS Bedrock / AI runtime environments
• Agent-to-Agent communication (A2A)
• Memory systems – Mem0 / Zep / LangGraph Checkpointers
• Redis / DynamoDB
• CrewAI / AutoGen / Semantic Kernel
• LLM prompting & tool integrations

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
• Design and implement LangGraph-based agent workflows
• Build agent-to-agent communication systems
• Implement multi-tier memory architecture (session, working, long-term)
• Integrate APIs, tools, and MCP endpoints into agent workflows
• Ensure reliable and scalable AI agent orchestration

📩 Interested candidates can share resumes at: hannah@timusconsulting.com

#AIJobs #AgenticAI #LangGraph #LangChain #AWS #Python #HiringNow #TechJobs

We’re Hiring: Business Development Manager / Sales Executive (Remote | Commission-Based)

Simplrize is looking for experienced Business Development / Sales professionals (7+ years) to drive global client acquisition for IT services (AI, Cybersecurity, Web & App Development, Software, Digital Solutions).
